---
name: 📚 Suggest a resource to add
about: Suggest a high-quality resource that belongs on the list
title: "[Add Resource] <resource name>"
labels: ["suggestion"]
---

## Resource

**Name:** [Resource name]  
**URL:** [Canonical link, preferably HTTPS]  
**Type:** [e.g., paper, model, tool, dataset, benchmark]

## Why it belongs

[Briefly explain why this resource is relevant to AI for bioengineering and where it should fit in the list. Which section? Why is it better than or distinct from existing entries?]

## Summary

[One or two sentences describing what the resource is and what it models, predicts, or generates.]

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [safety boundaries](../SECURITY.md)
- [ ] The link is canonical, HTTPS, and resolves correctly
- [ ] The resource is not already in the list
- [ ] The description is neutral, factual, and free of marketing language
- [ ] One resource per issue (if suggesting multiple, please open separate issues)
